title: Governance Context
description: Normalized governance-relevant fields extracted from a tool payload. Provides a consistent shape for the governance agent to validate against the plan, regardless of which tool originated the action.

countries.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes targeted by this action.

seller_url.description: URL of the seller agent this action targets.

audience_targeting.description: Audience targeting the caller intends to activate. Each entry is either a specific signal reference or a natural language description. The governance agent performs a three-way comparison: (1) this field against the plan's audience.include/exclude constraints, (2) this field against planned_delivery.audience_targeting when both are present, to detect divergence between what the orchestrator requested and what the seller will actually activate, and (3) the plan's policy_categories and restricted_attributes against the targeting criteria.
